diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -36,7 +36,7 @@
         return x

 

 class WeatherModel(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, hidden_channels=192, num_blocks=12):

+    def __init__(self, hidden_channels=256, num_blocks=12):

         super().__init__()

         self.input_conv = PeriodicConv2d(6, hidden_channels, kernel_size=5, padding=2)

         self.relu = nn.ReLU(inplace=True)

--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -20,7 +20,7 @@
 inputs_norm = (test_inputs - means) / stds

 inputs_torch = torch.from_numpy(inputs_norm).float()

 

-model = WeatherModel(hidden_channels=192, num_blocks=12)

+model = WeatherModel(hidden_channels=256, num_blocks=12)

 ckpt = torch.load(args.checkpoint, map_location='cpu')

 if 'model_state_dict' in ckpt:

     model.load_state_dict(ckpt['model_state_dict'])

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -62,13 +62,13 @@
     lat = np.load(os.path.join(data_dir, "lat.npy"))

     train_dataset = WeatherDataset(os.path.join(data_dir, "train_data.npy"), stride=2, norm_stats=norm_stats)

     val_dataset = WeatherDataset(os.path.join(data_dir, "val_data.npy"), stride=1, norm_stats=norm_stats)

-    train_loader = DataLoader(train_dataset, batch_size=48, shuffle=True, num_workers=4, pin_memory=True)

+    train_loader = DataLoader(train_dataset, batch_size=32, shuffle=True, num_workers=4, pin_memory=True)

     val_loader = DataLoader(val_dataset, batch_size=128, shuffle=False, num_workers=4, pin_memory=True)

     device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")

-    model = WeatherModel(hidden_channels=192, num_blocks=12).to(device)

-    optimizer = torch.optim.Adam(model.parameters(), lr=0.00025, weight_decay=1e-5)

-    scheduler = CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=25)

-    num_epochs = 25

+    model = WeatherModel(hidden_channels=256, num_blocks=12).to(device)

+    optimizer = torch.optim.Adam(model.parameters(), lr=0.00015, weight_decay=1e-5)

+    scheduler = CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=20)

+    num_epochs = 20

     best_rmse = float("inf")

     log_file = f"logs/iter_{RAB_ITERATION}/metrics.jsonl"

     os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(log_file), exist_ok=True)
